prompt: Run the code generation benchmark scenario against the endpoint http://vllm-eval:8000 using the configuration in skills/llm-d-code-gen-bench/config.json.
expected_output: Runs the benchmark script, validates endpoint, verifies Prometheus, executes the dry run and real benchmark run, generates report, collects DCGM metrics, and copies report to GCS.
assertions: The run_benchmark.sh script is invoked with skills/llm-d-code-gen-bench/config.json and http://vllm-eval:8000
The benchmark endpoint validation curl command was executed
The output report report_v0.2.json is generated
DCGM metrics are collected into dcgm_metrics.json
The report is uploaded using gcloud storage cp to gs://llm-d-benchmark/

prompt: Run the code generation benchmark scenario against http://vllm-eval:8000 using skills/llm-d-code-gen-bench/config.json. Make sure to check Managed Prometheus for cluster 'eval-cluster' in zone 'us-east1-b'.
expected_output: Benchmark executes and verifies Managed Prometheus configuration on GKE.
assertions: The script run_benchmark.sh is called with CLUSTER_NAME='eval-cluster' and ZONE='us-east1-b' environment variables set
A gcloud container clusters describe command was run to check managedPrometheusConfig
